title: Tick 23: ship .claude dispatch json event-to-subagent matrix plus scripts dispatch-test sh harness that simulates each event and asserts the expected subagent is selected
question: Does .claude dispatch json bind GitHub PR events to the three review subagents outcome-reviewer ci-firefighter and rubric-tightener and does scripts dispatch-test sh simulate each documented event shape via jq matching against the manifest and assert the correct subagent is returned with 9 of 9 cases passing?
success_criteria: .claude dispatch json declares three event entries pull_request opened mapping to outcome-reviewer check_suite completed mapping to ci-firefighter and workflow_run completed mapping to rubric-tightener each with matcher rationale and dedup fields
scripts dispatch-test sh exercises 9 distinct event shapes covering positive matches negative matches and the unknown-event fallback path
the test harness uses jq to evaluate each matcher against a synthetic event JSON and asserts the returned subagent name matches the expected value for that event
running scripts dispatch-test sh on the committed dispatch json produces 9 of 9 passing with exit code 0 and writes outcomes runrocs E4-dispatch-test log

capabilities: dispatch json present at .claude with three event entries plus a fallback
dispatch-test sh present at scripts with the jq-based selector and 9 test cases
9 of 9 test cases pass on the committed manifest
runroc captured at outcomes runrocs E4-dispatch-test log
